docket_entries.description: CROSS COMPLAINT FILED BY CROSS COMPLAINANT RYDER TRUCK RENTAL AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LIVINGSTON, CLYDE A. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ROES 1 TO 30

THIS CASE WAS RECEIVED FROM SUPERIOR COURT ON 10-24-97 AND ENTERED ON THE SAME DAY. THE FILING FEE IN THIS MATTER WAS WAIVED AS THE PARTY REQUESTING THE TRANSFER IS A CITY AGENCY. THE SUPERIOR COURT CASE NO.IN THIS MATTER IS 977781.

IN ADDITION MOVING PARTY MAY SEEK SEPARATE ACTION; GRANT DEFT RYDER'S GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT MOTION; DEFENDANT RYDER TO PREPARE ORDER.
